description_long: A muscular adult male figure is dressed in military-style attire, featuring camouflage cargo pants, black combat boots, and a tactical harness with multiple pouches and grenades. He is shirtless, revealing a well-defined torso, and wears fingerless gloves and a maroon beret tilted to one side. His face is stern, with sunglasses and a visible scar across his cheek, adding to his tough appearance. Strapped across his back is a quiver containing arrows, suggesting a readiness for combat or tactical missions. The figure's accessories, such as a belt with utility items and a holster, further emphasize his preparedness. The overall look is that of a battle-hardened soldier or special forces operative, equipped for urban or field operations.
description: A muscular, shirtless male soldier in camouflage pants, combat boots, and a maroon beret, equipped with tactical gear and a quiver of arrows. He has a stern expression, sunglasses, and a scarred face, exuding a battle-ready presence.
description_view_0: Front view shows the soldier's muscular build, bare chest, tactical harness, beret, sunglasses, and facial scar.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the beret, sunglasses, gloves, and the quiver of arrows strapped to his back.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the crossed harness straps, quiver with arrows, and the camouflage pattern on the pants.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the face, gloves, and the quiver's position on the back.
attribute_clothing_type: military tactical harness, camouflage cargo pants, fingerless gloves, beret, utility belt
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: short hair mostly covered by beret
